audit_items.proof_trace: Function freenect_network_initSocket() returns error status codes but callers at lines 48 and 61 ignore return values completely. Socket initialization failures go undetected, causing subsequent network operations to use uninitialized socket values.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Network initialization fails due to resource exhaustion or permissions, but caller proceeds with uninitialized socket values, leading to crashes or undefined behavior in accept/read/write operations.
